paths.name: @madar/db
paths.message: Tenant-realm code must use tenantScoped(tenantId) only. adminPrisma bypasses RLS and basePrisma sets no session vars; both are cross-realm leaks here. Shared cross-realm work lives in apps/api/src/payment-proofs-shared.

paths.name: @madar/db
paths.message: Admin-realm code must use adminPrisma only. Cross-realm calls are forbidden (CLAUDE.md). Shared cross-realm work lives in apps/api/src/payment-proofs-shared.
